title: Rich Silky Chinese Cherry Tomatoes Noodles
description: A jammy and silky Chinese dish featuring cherry tomatoes and a pasta water emulsion, perfect for a nostalgic and macrobiotic friendly meal. This dish is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic and grated ginger.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook until they release their juices and start to break down.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the cherry tomatoes and garlic ginger mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the noodles and cherry tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a little of the pasta water to create a silky emulsion by stirring it into the sauce.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional cherry tomatoes if desired.
